description: CompositionWhite polo neck t-shirt with bold navy blue stripes  and thin grey stripes,  with the digits 99 and brand name embroidered on left chestFittingRegularWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron Look stylish in this striped polo neck t-shirt from scullers.  The bold colour sttripes on the white base gives a really fresh feel.  Pair it with denims or chinos and floaters for a careful yet careless look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
